SEARCH
Package opennlp.service

Class TokenizerService

java.lang.Object
opennlp.TokenizerTaggerServiceGrpc.TokenizerTaggerServiceImplBase
opennlp.service.TokenizerService
All Implemented Interfaces:
io.grpc.BindableService, AutoCloseable, CacheAware<opennlp.tools.tokenize.Tokenizer>, ExceptionAware, ModelAware<opennlp.tools.tokenize.Tokenizer>
@ThreadSafe public class TokenizerService extends opennlp.TokenizerTaggerServiceGrpc.TokenizerTaggerServiceImplBase implements CacheAware<opennlp.tools.tokenize.Tokenizer>, AutoCloseable, ExceptionAware, ModelAware<opennlp.tools.tokenize.Tokenizer>
The Tokenizer class implements a gRPC service for tokenization using Apache OpenNLP models. It extends the auto-generated gRPC base class TokenizerTaggerServiceGrpc.TokenizerTaggerServiceImplBase.

This service provides functionality for:

  • Retrieving available tokenizer models loaded from the classpath.
  • Performing tokenization on an input string.
  • Performing positional tokenization on an input string.

Configuration:

  • model.location: Directory to search for models (default: "extlib").
  • model.recursive: Whether to scan subdirectories (default: true).
  • model.tokenizer.wildcard.pattern: Wildcard pattern to identify tokenization models (default: "opennlp-models-tokenizer-*.jar").

  • Constructor Details

    • TokenizerService

      public TokenizerService(Map<String,String> conf)
      Initializes a Tokenizer service with the given configuration properties.

      The configuration properties are provided as a Map<String, String> and define various parameters required for the service, such as model locations, recursive loading, and wildcard patterns.

      Example configuration: 

      
 server.enable_reflection = false
 model.location = target/test-classes/models
 model.recursive = true
 model.tokenizer.wildcard.pattern = opennlp-models-tokenizer-*.jar
      Parameters:
      conf - Configuration properties for the service (key-value format). Must not be null. If a property is missing, default values are used.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if an IOException occurs during model cache initialization.

    • getAvailableModels

      public void getAvailableModels(opennlp.OpenNLPService.Empty request, io.grpc.stub.StreamObserver<opennlp.OpenNLPService.AvailableModels> responseObserver)

    • getModelCache

      public Map<String,opennlp.tools.models.ClassPathModel> getModelCache()
      Description copied from interface: CacheAware
      Returns the model cache containing ClassPathModel objects.

      The returned cache maps unique string identifiers (e.g., model names or paths) to their corresponding ClassPathModel instances.

      Specified by:
      getModelCache in interface CacheAware<opennlp.tools.tokenize.Tokenizer>
      Returns:
      A Map representing the model cache.

    • getServiceCache

      public Map<String,opennlp.tools.tokenize.Tokenizer> getServiceCache()
      Description copied from interface: CacheAware
      Returns the service cache containing service objects of type T.

      The returned cache maps unique string identifiers to their corresponding service objects. Service objects can be of any type, as defined by the generic parameter T.

      Specified by:
      getServiceCache in interface CacheAware<opennlp.tools.tokenize.Tokenizer>
      Returns:
      A Map representing the service cache.

    • close

      public void close()
      Clears the in-memory caches for services and models.
      Specified by:
      close in interface AutoCloseable
